nl: Design a handheld environmental monitor that measures PM2.5, CO2, temperature, and humidity, runs 8 hours on a rechargeable battery, and syncs data via Wi-Fi or Bluetooth.

concepts.name: Balanced Portable Monitor (Wi‑Fi + BLE)
concepts.approach: A handheld all-purpose device built around an ESP32 (integrated Wi‑Fi + BLE) with a laser-scattering PM2.5 sensor (e.g., Plantower PMS7003 or equivalent), an NDIR CO2 sensor (Sensirion SCD30 or Senseair S8), and a high-accuracy temperature/humidity sensor (Sensirion SHT35 or Bosch BME280). Air sampling uses a small low-noise blower that runs intermittently (duty-cycled) to reduce power while maintaining representative PM2.5 readings. Device firmware performs onboard averaging, stores data to internal flash, and syncs in real time over Wi‑Fi or on-demand via BLE to a phone app. Rechargeable 3.7 V Li‑ion pack (≈4000 mAh) plus USB‑C charging and power‑management IC provide >8 hours typical runtime with continuous periodic sampling (e.g., 1 min sample every 1–5 min). UI: 2.4" color display, simple 3‑button control, and OTA firmware updates over Wi‑Fi.
highlights: Integrated Wi‑Fi + BLE (ESP32) for direct cloud sync or local smartphone relay
Accurate NDIR CO2 and laser-scattering PM2.5 sensors for reliable indoor air quality readings
Intermittent blower duty-cycling and sensor duty management to meet >8 hours runtime on a ~4000 mAh battery
On-device storage (flash), timestamped samples, and OTA firmware updates
User-friendly 2.4" color display and companion mobile app for trend visualization and export

concepts.name: Low‑Power BLE‑First Monitor (Pocketable)
concepts.approach: A compact, pocketable monitor optimized for long battery life and Bluetooth-first sync. Central MCU is an ultra-low-power nRF52840 (BLE 5.0). CO2 measurement uses a low-power NDIR module (Sensirion SCD4x family) designed for intermittent sampling; PM2.5 uses a low-power optical particulate sensor (miniature sensor with onboard fan control) sampled at user-configurable intervals (e.g., every 60–300 s). Temperature and humidity from a low-power SHTC3/SHT3x. Device minimizes radio and pump duty cycles: BLE only transmits when a paired phone polls or at configurable heartbeat intervals; no Wi‑Fi radio on board (Wi‑Fi upload handled by phone gateway). 3000–3500 mAh Li‑ion battery + aggressive power management yields 8–48 hours depending on sampling cadence; default profile targets 8–12 hours. Simple status LEDs and haptic/vibration alerts; companion app performs cloud sync and config.
highlights: BLE-first architecture (nRF52840) for very low standby power and fast pairing
Low-power NDIR CO2 (SCD4x-class) and miniature PM sensor with duty-cycled sampling
Designed for pocket portability and multi-day operation with adjustable sampling intervals
Relies on smartphone as Wi‑Fi gateway to offload heavy network energy cost
Small form factor with LED/haptic alerts and a lightweight companion app for logs/export

concepts.name: Professional Continuous‑Sampling Monitor (Wi‑Fi Primary)
concepts.approach: A rugged, professional handheld unit targeted at field technicians: high-accuracy sensors (Senseair S8 or CO2 NDIR module with built‑in ABC disable for calibration control; Honeywell/HPM series or Plantower high-flow PM sensor), dedicated sample pump with flow control for continuous sampling, and precision temperature/humidity sensor (Bosch BME688/BME280). Processor is a dual-core MCU + Wi‑Fi module (e.g., ESP32-WROVER or STM32 + Wi‑Fi combo) with local analytics (AQI computation, baseline correction, calibration routines). Large capacity rechargeable battery 6000 mAh (or removable hot-swap pack) provides >8 hours even under continuous sampling and frequent Wi‑Fi uploads; USB‑C fast charging and optional vehicle charging. Features: color touchscreen, microSD for raw data, wired USB and BLE for local access, Wi‑Fi for cloud sync, secure OTA, and field calibration mode with user prompts. Enclosure is IP54 with rubberized grip and belt clip.
highlights: Designed for continuous, high-fidelity sampling with an active pump and high-accuracy sensors
Wi‑Fi-first with local analytics, secure cloud upload, and full OTA firmware update support
6000 mAh battery (removable option) and power‑preservation modes to guarantee >8 hours even with continuous sampling
Professional features: touchscreen, microSD raw data logging, field calibration workflow, and ruggedized enclosure
Multiple connectivity options (Wi‑Fi, BLE, USB) for flexible data extraction and enterprise integration
